subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, pure leaf! Upon thee be the Glory of God, and may He perfume thy senses with the holy fragrances at every eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه زکیه علیک بهاء الله و عطر الله مشامک بنفحات القدس فی کل عشی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @firmness in the Covenant
